zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Ros於1230年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾爾姆斯利時，她的父親Sir William de Ros of Helmsley38歲，母親Lucy Fitzpeter23歲。她於1266年與Saire Sutton在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1290年在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Ros于1230年出生在英国英格兰越可爾爾姆斯利时，她的父亲Sir William de Ros of Helmsley38岁，母亲Lucy Fitzpeter23岁。她于1266年与Saire Sutton在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1290年在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Ros was born in 1230, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Ros of Helmsley, was 38 and her mother, Lucy Fitzpeter, was 23. She married Saire Sutton in 1266, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1290, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Ros est née en 1230, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Ros of Helmsley, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lucy Fitzpeter, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Saire Sutton en 1266, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1290, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Ros 1230 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Ros of Helmsley 38 und ihre Mutter Lucy Fitzpeter 23. Sie hat 1266 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Saire Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1290 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Ros è nata il nel 1230 nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Ros of Helmsley, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lucy Fitzpeter, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Saire Sutton nel 1266, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1290, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Rosが1230年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ros of Helmsleyは38歳，母Lucy Fitzpeterは23歳であった。1266年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでSaire Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1290年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Ros(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Ros of Helmsley(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Fitzpeter(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Saire Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Ros nasceu em 1230, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Ros of Helmsley, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Fitzpeter, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Saire Sutton em 1266, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1290, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Ros родилась в 1230 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Ros of Helmsley было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Fitzpeter, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Saire Sutton в 1266 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1290 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de Ros nació en 1230, en Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Ros of Helmsley, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lucy Fitzpeter, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Saire Sutton en 1266, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1290, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
